meta.notes:
## STOA — Linear Ticket Sync to PocketBase

Syncs Linear issue updates to PocketBase `tickets` collection for HEGEMON session briefs.

### Required env vars (n8n):
- `POCKETBASE_URL`: e.g., https://state.gostoa.dev
- `POCKETBASE_ADMIN_TOKEN`: PocketBase admin auth token

### Setup:
1. Create `tickets` collection in PocketBase with fields: ticket_id (text), title (text), status (text), estimate (number), priority (number), component (text), summary (text), parent_id (text), cycle (text), updated_at (text)
2. Configure Linear webhook pointing to n8n: POST https://n8n.gostoa.dev/webhook/linear-ticket-sync
3. Set POCKETBASE_URL and POCKETBASE_ADMIN_TOKEN in n8n env vars
4. Activate workflow
